examples: Did you know your husband was a bigamist?
And ever since that day, I have considered becoming a bigamist.
And if they had all accepted, you would have become a bigamist.
Mr Yilmaz's cabinet, it is true, does not contain, as its piously Islamist-led predecessor did, a bigamist minister.
Unsuspecting victims of a bigamist are also eligible for an annulment.
